name: Supabase
description: Supabase backend platform - query, insert, update, and manage database rows and tables via the REST API

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Supabase anon/service role key (find in Project Settings > API)

tools.name: find_rows
tools.description: Query rows from a Supabase table using filters, sorting, and pagination via the PostgREST API. Supports eq, neq, gt, lt, gte, lte, like, ilike, is, in, and other PostgREST operators in the select and filter parameters.

table.description: The name of the table to query

select.description: Columns to return, comma-separated (e.g. 'id,name,email'). Use '*' for all columns. Supports embedded resources like 'id,name,posts(id,title)'.

filter.description: PostgREST filter string appended as query params (e.g. 'status=eq.active&age=gte.18'). Supports operators: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, like, ilike, is, in, cs, cd, ov, sl, sr, nxl, nxr, adj, not, or, and.

order.description: Column to order by with direction (e.g. 'created_at.desc' or 'name.asc')

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return

offset.description: Number of rows to skip (for pagination)

tools.name: find_table
tools.description: Get the schema definition and column details for a specific table in the Supabase database. Returns column names, data types, nullability, defaults, and constraints by querying the information_schema.

table_name.description: The name of the table to look up (e.g. 'users', 'orders')

tools.name: update_row
tools.description: Update one or more rows in a Supabase table that match the given filter criteria. Uses the PATCH method with PostgREST filters to target specific rows. Returns the updated row(s).

table.description: The name of the table to update

filter.description: PostgREST filter to identify which row(s) to update (e.g. 'id=eq.123' or 'email=eq.user@example.com'). REQUIRED to prevent accidental full-table updates.

data.description: An object containing the column values to update (e.g. { "name": "New Name", "status": "active" })

tools.name: add_row
tools.description: Insert a new row into a Supabase table. Provide the column values as a JSON object in the data field. Returns the newly created row.

table.description: The name of the table to insert into

data.description: An object containing the column values for the new row (e.g. { "name": "John", "email": "john@example.com" })
